# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
# Frontend Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Frontend service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for this deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Configure sidecar proxy resource limits
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        # Configure traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "443"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry/frontend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "frontend-service"
            - name: BACKEND_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: ORDER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Backend API Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom config
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Backend API service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled and custom configuration"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for this deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Custom sidecar proxy resource allocation for backend workloads
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        # Configure log level for sidecar proxy
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "misc:error"
        # Include specific inbound ports for traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8081,9090"
        # Exclude database port from outbound traffic interception
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432,6379"
        # Enable access logging on the sidecar
        sidecar.istio.io/statsInclusionPrefixes: "cluster.outbound,listener"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry/backend-api-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "backend-api-service"
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              value: "cache-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: REDIS_PORT
              value: "6379"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /etc/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: config-volume
          configMap:
            name: backend-api-config

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-api-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with hold application start
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order processing service with Istio sidecar proxy and holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Ensure the sidecar proxy is ready before the application starts
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
            zipkin:
              address: zipkin.istio-system.svc.cluster.local:9411
        # Sidecar resource configuration
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "750m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "384Mi"
        # Traffic management annotations
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8082"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432"
        # Rewrite HTTP probes to go through the sidecar
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: order-service-secrets
                  key: database-url
            - name: KAFKA_BROKERS
              value: "kafka-broker.microservices.svc.cluster.local:9092"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "300m"
              memory: "384Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "750m"
              memory: "768Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Database Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (external managed database proxy)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio-excluded
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Database proxy service with Istio sidecar injection DISABLED to avoid conflicts with database connection pooling"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for database service
        # Database connections use persistent TCP connections that conflict with Envoy proxy
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: pgbouncer
          image: myregistry/pgbouncer:1.18.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: database-credentials
                  key: host
            - name: DATABASE_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: database-credentials
                  key: username
            - name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: database-credentials
                  key: password
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-service
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Cache Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (Redis does not benefit from mesh)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio-excluded
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Redis cache service with Istio sidecar injection DISABLED to reduce latency overhead"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        # Explicitly DISABLE Istio sidecar proxy injection for cache service
        # Redis uses binary protocol and low-latency connections that don't benefit from service mesh
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: cache-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Notification Service - Canary deployment v2 with Istio sidecar injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service-v2
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v2
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Notification service canary v2 with Istio sidecar for traffic splitting"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v2
      annotations:
        # Enable Istio sidecar proxy injection for canary deployment
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Custom Envoy proxy configuration for canary
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          concurrency: 2
          drainDuration: 30s
          parentShutdownDuration: 45s
          terminationDrainDuration: 10s
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8083"
        # Inject custom headers for canary tracking
        sidecar.istio.io/userVolume: '[{"name":"canary-config","configMap":{"name":"notification-canary-config"}}]'
        sidecar.istio.io/userVolumeMount: '[{"name":"canary-config","mountPath":"/etc/istio/canary","readOnly":true}]'
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: myregistry/notification-service:2.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "notification-service"
            - name: SERVICE_VERSION
              value: "v2"
            - name: SMTP_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-secrets
                  key: smtp-host
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# ServiceAccounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cache-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
# ConfigMap for backend API service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: backend-api-config
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
data:
  application.yaml: |
    server:
      port: 8081
    logging:
      level: INFO
    mesh:
      enabled: true
      provider: istio

---
# ConfigMap for notification canary configuration
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: notification-canary-config
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v2
data:
  canary.yaml: |
    canary:
      enabled: true
      version: v2
      traffic_percentage: 10

---
# Istio DestinationRule for notification service traffic splitting
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: notification-service-destination
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  host: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2

---
# Istio VirtualService for notification service canary routing
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: notification-service-routing
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8083
          weight: 90
        - destination:
            host: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8083
          weight: 10
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable

---
# PeerAuthentication - enforce mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
